title: cistus commutatus
intro: Cistus commutatus, also known as the Mediterranean cistus or rockrose, is a shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and woody stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cistus commutatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cistus commutatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
